scripts.build:renderer: npm run build:html && npm run build:scss && node scripts/build-ts.mjs renderer
scripts.validate:local:quick: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run validate:local:quick:core && npm run validate:local:quick:preview && npm run validate:local:quick:ui && npm run validate:local:watch && npm run doctor:electron
scripts.validate:local:quick:core: npm run validate:structure && npm run validate:project-graph && npm run validate:project-watch
scripts.validate:local:quick:preview: npm run validate:preview && npm run validate:dom-snapshot && npm run validate:preview-selection && npm run validate:preview-inspector
scripts.validate:local:quick:ui: npm run validate:design-canvas && npm run validate:visual-selection-overlay && npm run validate:html-element-library && npm run validate:source-patch-preview && npm run validate:ui-flow
